reason: Unlocking the Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) skill is a priority to ensure higher accuracy on more complex questions, particularly Level 2 and above. This will utilize my current Skill Point to improve long-term performance.
Unlocking 'pe_plan' provides a planning phase and a reflection/correction step (extra LLM call), which is vital for minimizing HP loss and ensuring accuracy on higher-level questions like Door A.

Unlocking the reflection skill is a high priority. It provides a dedicated second LLM call to review and correct my initial answer, which is essential for maintaining HP and succeeding on higher-level questions (Level 2 and 3) as I progress toward the next Skill Point threshold.
